question: Which statement about night reading preference is most accurate?

options.A: About two‑fifths of people in county Z prefer night.
options.B: More than half of people in county Z prefer night.
options.C: Night and morning preferences are exactly the same.
options.D: Almost no one in county Z prefers night.

explanation: The Night slice is 43%, which is less than half. The misleading angle encourages choosing that more than half prefer night, but the majority is actually the Morning slice (57%).
